title: 这只价值 800 美元的跳跃机器人摄像狗让我充满了欢乐
summary: What if you had a drone that wasn't a buzzy, annoying fly people wanted to swat - but rather a cute dog that runs and jumps? What if it could do tricks on command and film your tricks as well? What if it could get right back up after a nasty-looking crash, dozens of times […]（原题：This jumping $800 robot camera dog filled me with joy）

title: NVIDIA 和 Hugging Face 为乐机器人带来新模型和框架
